title: Notifications - Device charging
scenario: Verify that a charging notification with the headset name and app icon appears when the app is in the background and a connected headset is plugged into the charger, and that tapping it redirects to the app's Home screen.
steps: 1. Launch the app and connect any Headset (ensure it is not fully charged).
2. Put the app in the background.
3. Plug the Headset into the charger.
expected: A notification about charging the headset appears, containing the headset name and "Charging" text. Clicking the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens app's Home screen of the device.
